premium.sous_titre: Start for free, upgrade to a paid plan when you're ready. No commitment, cancel anytime.
premium.essai: Not convinced yet? The Free plan is free, no credit card required.

faq.q: Can I change plan at any time?
faq.r: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. The difference is prorated.

faq.q: Is the Free plan really free?
faq.r: Yes, the Free plan is free with no commitment and no credit card. You only move to a paid plan when you want to.
Yearly billing is paid in one go and represents about 2 months free compared to monthly billing.
Yes, your data is encrypted and backed up daily.

about.title: The African fashion ecosystem
about.p1: Gextimo connects fashion creators — tailors, stylists, pattern makers — with their clients across Benin and West Africa. Our mission: showcase African craftsmanship and make it easy for talents and clients to meet.
about.p2: We give creators a professional showcase, management tools (clients, orders, measurements, cash register) and, soon, ways to monetize their visibility.

aide.title: Support & FAQ
aide.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.

faq.q: How do I create my creator account?
faq.a: Download the Gextimo app and sign up in minutes. Your public showcase is generated automatically.

faq.q: How do I publish my creations?
faq.a: From your space, add your models to your catalogue then enable their publication on the showcase.

faq.q: How does a client contact me?
faq.a: If you enable the option, a WhatsApp button appears on your public profile to receive quotes and orders.
Account creation and the basic showcase are free. Premium options will come to boost your visibility.

aide.contact: Write to us at support@gextimo.africa — we reply within 48 h.

artisans.p1: Browse a library of models and collections to find inspiration, compare styles and choose the creator who will make your custom outfit.
artisans.p2: Many models are freely accessible to help you express your ideas to your tailor.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting your privacy.

sections.p: Gextimo (a NovAfriq brand), a company operating in Benin, is the controller of your personal data collected through the gextimo.com platform.
We collect data you provide when creating your account (name, email address, phone number), transaction information, and browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) via technical cookies.
Your data is used to: manage your account, process orders, communicate about your project status, improve our services and, with your consent, send marketing communications.
Data processing is based on contract performance (orders, account), compliance with legal obligations, your consent (newsletters) and our legitimate interest in improving our services.

Your data may be shared with selected creators to fulfil your order, our secure payment providers (under confidentiality agreement), and competent authorities if required by law. We never sell your data to third parties.
Your data is retained for the duration of your account and up to 5 years after your last activity, in accordance with applicable legal deadlines in Benin.

In accordance with Law No. 2009-09 on personal data protection in Benin, you have the right of access, rectification, erasure and objection. To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@gextimo.com.
We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures: TLS encryption of communications, restricted data access, secure hosting.

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.subtitle: Legal information about the Gextimo platform.

sections.p: Gextimo is a registered trademark of NovAfriq, a company registered in the Trade and Personal Property Credit Register (RCCM) of Benin. Registered office: Cotonou, Republic of Benin. Contact: contact@gextimo.com
The publication director is the legal representative of NovAfriq.
The platform is hosted on secure servers. For any questions relating to technical infrastructure, please contact our support team.
All elements of the Gextimo site (texts, graphics, logo, images, interface) are protected by intellectual property law and are the exclusive property of NovAfriq, unless otherwise stated.

NovAfriq strives to ensure the accuracy of information published on the platform but cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions. Creators are solely responsible for the creations they publish.
These legal notices are governed by Beninese law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent court of Cotonou.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Understanding how Gextimo uses cookies to improve your experience.

sections.p: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, smartphone) when you visit our site. It allows us to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
These cookies are essential to the platform's operation: authentication, cart, language and currency preferences. They cannot be disabled.
We use anonymised analytics tools to measure page traffic and identify the most-used journeys. This data helps us improve our services.
These cookies remember your preferences (light/dark theme, currency, language) to offer you a personalised experience on each visit.

You can accept or reject non-essential cookies via our consent banner. You can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling some cookies may affect your experience on the platform.
Session cookies expire when you close your browser. Persistent cookies have a maximum duration of 13 months, in accordance with recommendations from data protection authorities.

protection_donnees.title: Data Protection (APDP)
protection_donnees.subtitle: Compliance with Beninese Law No. 2009-09 on personal data protection.

sections.p: The Gextimo platform complies with Law No. 2009-09 of 22 May 2009 on the protection of personal data in the Republic of Benin, as well as the recommendations of the Personal Data Protection Authority (APDP).
In accordance with Article 14 of Law No. 2009-09, personal data processing carried out by Gextimo has been declared to the Benin APDP.
We do not collect sensitive data as defined by law (racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs, health data). Only data necessary to provide our services is collected.

In accordance with Articles 21 to 30 of Law No. 2009-09, you have the right of access, rectification, erasure, objection and portability of your personal data. These rights are exercised by email at: privacy@gextimo.com, accompanied by proof of identity.
Any request relating to your rights will be processed within a maximum of 30 days from receipt of your complete request.

If you believe your rights are not being respected, you may submit a complaint to the Personal Data Protection Authority of Benin (APDP), whose contact details are available on the official Beninese government website.

cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.subtitle: The rules governing use of the Gextimo platform.

sections.p: These Terms of Use (ToU) define the terms and conditions for using the Gextimo platform, accessible at gextimo.com, and the rights and obligations of users.
Access to certain platform features requires creating an account. The user must be at least 18 years old and provide accurate information during registration.

Users agree to use the platform lawfully, not to impersonate third parties, not to distribute unlawful content or content that infringes third-party rights, and to respect creators' intellectual property.

Gextimo is a platform connecting creators and customers. We are not party to contracts concluded between users. Gextimo's liability is limited to best-efforts obligations regarding platform availability.
The platform's content (excluding artisan creations) is the exclusive property of NovAfriq. Any reproduction, representation or distribution without prior authorisation is prohibited.
Gextimo reserves the right to suspend or delete any account in the event of a breach of these ToU, without notice or compensation. Users may close their account at any time from their settings.
Gextimo may amend these ToU at any time. Users will be notified of material changes by email or platform notification. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
These ToU are governed by Beninese law. In the event of a dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable resolution before any legal action.

droits_createurs.title: Creator Rights & Intellectual Property
droits_createurs.subtitle: Understanding the protection of your creations on the Gextimo platform.

sections.p: You retain full intellectual property rights over your creations published on Gextimo: models, drawings, photos, descriptions. By publishing on the platform, you grant us only a non-exclusive licence limited to displaying your portfolio.

By uploading your creations, you grant Gextimo a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sub-licensable licence solely for the purpose of promoting your studio on the platform and its official communication channels.

It is strictly prohibited for any platform user to reproduce, download without authorisation, distribute or commercialise another creator's creations. Any breach exposes the perpetrator to civil and criminal proceedings.
If you believe that a creation published on Gextimo infringes your rights, you can submit a report via the Contact & Claims page. Our team will process your request within 72 hours.

Each creator warrants that published creations are original and do not infringe the intellectual property rights of any third party. In the event of a dispute on this point, liability rests exclusively with the creator.

conditions_vente.title: Terms of Sale & Commissions
conditions_vente.subtitle: Pricing, commissions and payment processes on Gextimo.

sections.p: Every order on Gextimo follows a multi-step process: selecting the creation and creator, sending a quote request, confirmation by the creator, secure payment, and production tracking. The order is definitively confirmed upon payment validation.

Prices displayed on creator profiles are indicative. The final price is set in the quote agreed between the customer and creator. Prices are exclusive of delivery costs, which are indicated separately during the order.

Gextimo charges a commission on each transaction completed via the platform. The commission rate is communicated to creators upon registration and may vary according to the subscription plan. The commission is automatically deducted at the time of settlement.
Payments are secured by our approved providers. Gextimo never stores your banking information. Accepted currencies are displayed at checkout.

In the event of a payment dispute, contact our support within 30 days of the transaction. We will make our best effort to resolve the disagreement. If unsuccessful, the parties may resort to mediation.
A summary of each transaction is available in your personal space. Creators receive a confirmation of each transfer with details of commissions deducted.

produits_interdits.title: Prohibited Products & Authorised Creations
produits_interdits.subtitle: What can and cannot be published on the Gextimo platform.

sections.p: Gextimo is dedicated to African fashion and textile craftsmanship. Permitted: all garments (dresses, suits, boubous, children's ensembles, fashion accessories), made-to-measure or ready-to-wear creations, and creations inspired by African textiles and traditions.

Each published creation must accurately correspond to its photos and descriptions. Images must be of good quality and faithfully represent the creation. Stolen photos, deceptively retouched images, or photos that do not match reality are prohibited.

Strictly prohibited on Gextimo: selling counterfeits or copies of protected brands, creations that violate human dignity, misleading or fraudulent listings, selling products outside the fashion/textile sector, and any activity unlawful under Beninese legislation.
It is prohibited to reproduce or draw too directly from other designers' original creations without their explicit authorisation. Gextimo respects and enforces intellectual property rights.

Any breach of these rules will result in immediate removal of the creation, a warning, and in the event of a repeat offence, permanent account suspension without refund of subscription fees. Counterfeiting cases will be reported to the competent authorities.

livraison_retours.title: Delivery, Returns & Refunds
livraison_retours.subtitle: Delivery terms, return policy and refund conditions.

sections.p: Delivery times and costs are defined by each creator and indicated on their profile and in the quote. Gextimo is not directly responsible for delivery but supports the parties in the event of a dispute. Local (Cotonou and major cities) and international delivery options are available depending on the creator.

You can track the status of your order from your client area or via the public tracking page (by entering your order reference). Creators are required to update the order status at each important stage.

Made-to-measure creations are produced specifically for you according to your measurements and preferences. Due to their personalised nature, they are not eligible for return unless a proven non-conformity defect is established.

For ready-to-wear items, a return is possible within 14 days of receipt, provided the item is in its original condition (unworn, tags attached). Return costs are the customer's responsibility unless the item is defective.

In the event of an accepted return or cancellation before production begins, the refund will be processed to the original payment method within 7 to 14 business days. The Gextimo commission is non-refundable except in the event of our fault.

In the event of a dispute with a creator regarding delivery or the conformity of an order, contact our support via the claims form. Our team arbitrates disputes based on evidence provided by both parties.

regles_communaute.title: Community Rules
regles_communaute.subtitle: The values and behaviours expected of all platform members.

sections.p: Gextimo is a community built on mutual respect, celebrating African talent and transparency. We believe African fashion deserves a worthy showcase — and that starts with respectful exchanges between all members.

Any discriminatory, hateful or disrespectful language towards a creator, customer or Gextimo team member is strictly prohibited. The Gextimo community welcomes talent from across Africa without distinction.

Creators commit to displaying photos and descriptions that faithfully represent their creations, communicating honestly about timelines and honouring commitments made to customers. Published reviews and testimonials must be authentic.

Prohibited on the platform: spam and unauthorised commercial solicitations, harassment or intimidation of other members, publishing fake reviews, manipulating ratings, attempting to bypass the platform to conduct transactions outside Gextimo, and any fraudulent activity.
Any community member can report inappropriate behaviour via the report button on profiles and creations. Reports are handled by our moderation team within 48 hours.

Breaches of community rules result in progressive sanctions: warning, temporary restriction, account suspension. Serious violations (fraud, harassment, counterfeiting) may result in immediate and permanent suspension.

contact_reclamations.title: Contact & Claims
contact_reclamations.subtitle: How to contact us and submit a claim on the Gextimo platform.

sections.p: For any questions or information requests, our team is reachable by email at: contact@gextimo.com. You can also use the contact form accessible from the Help section of the platform.

For any technical issue (login, payment, display), contact our support at: support@gextimo.com. Please specify your user ID, the browser used and a detailed description of the problem. Our team commits to responding within 24 business hours.

A claim may relate to: a non-conforming order, a dispute with a creator, a counterfeiting report or a billing issue. Send your detailed claim to reclamations@gextimo.com, attaching any useful documents (photos, exchanges, order references).
Every claim is acknowledged within 24 hours. Full processing takes place within 7 business days. In complex disputes, this deadline may be extended to 21 days, with regular updates on progress.

If you remain dissatisfied after our handling, you may resort to an independent mediator. Gextimo commits to participating in good faith in any mediation procedure aimed at resolving a dispute amicably.
For any request relating to your personal data (access, rectification, deletion), contact our data protection officer: privacy@gextimo.com.

a_propos.description: Gextimo is the management application dedicated to tailoring workshops. It allows you to manage your clients, measurements, orders, and team from your phone.

features.commandes_desc: Track all your orders from measurements to delivery.
features.fidelite_desc: Accumulate points and offer bonuses to your best clients.
features.securite_desc: Your data is stored securely and backed up.
features.rapide_desc: Interface designed for craftsmen — simple, fast, efficient.

faq.q1: How do I add a new client?
faq.a1: Go to the Clients section, then tap the + button at the bottom right. Enter the client's name, surname, and phone number.
faq.q2: How do I record a client's measurements?
faq.a2: Open the client file, scroll to the Measurements section and tap "Edit measurements". You can enter all measurements and save them.
faq.q3: How do I create an order?
faq.a3: Tap the + button from the dashboard or the Orders page. Select the client, garment type, price, and expected delivery date.
faq.q4: How do I record a client payment?
faq.a4: From the order detail, scroll to the Payments section and tap "Add a payment". Enter the amount and payment method.
faq.q5: How do I add a team member?
faq.a5: Go to Settings → Team, then tap the + icon in the top right. A unique access code will be generated for the new member.
faq.q6: How does a team member sign in?
faq.a6: On the sign in page, tap the "Assistant / Staff" tab. Enter the access code provided by the owner. The initial password is the same as the access code.
faq.q7: How do I renew my subscription?
faq.a7: Go to Settings → Subscription. You will find available plans with a button to choose or renew your subscription via FedaPay.
faq.q8: Is my data backed up automatically?
faq.a8: Yes, all data is synchronized with our server in real time whenever you have an internet connection.
faq.q9: How do I send a WhatsApp reminder to a client?
faq.a9: From the client file, tap the WhatsApp icon. The app generates a pre-filled message that you simply send.
faq.q10: How do I redeem my loyalty points?
faq.a10: Go to the Loyalty Points section. If you have reached the conversion threshold, you will see a button "Convert to subscription days". Each conversion gives you 31 additional days.

contact.disponibilite: Our team is available to help you Monday to Friday, from 8am to 6pm.
contact.urgence: For urgent issues, prefer WhatsApp. For technical questions or refunds, use email.

historique.vide_description: Your recent actions will appear here

ticket_detail.ferme_message: This ticket is closed. Create a new ticket if needed.

paiement_retour.succes_desc: Your subscription has been activated successfully.
paiement_retour.succes_desc_sponso: Your promotion has been activated successfully.
paiement_retour.echec_inconnu: Unable to verify the status of this payment.
paiement_retour.echec_desc: The payment did not go through. You can try again.

parametres.mdp_trop_court: New password must be at least 8 characters.

notifications.broadcast_desc: Leave «Workshop» empty to broadcast to all active workshops.

codes_promo.aucun: No promo codes. Create one or run the ambassadors seeder.

bienvenue.etape1_desc: Add your logo, specialty and contact info to be visible.
bienvenue.etape2_desc: Publish your work to attract clients.

outils_creatifs.aucun_sous: Add sketches, tech packs, patterns or moodboards to enrich your storefront.

meta.palette_aide: Tip: paste color codes (#c2410c, #0e7490…) to display swatches.

vide.croquis_sous: Draw your ideas and photograph them: your digital sketchbook starts here.
vide.fiche_technique_sous: Create structured sheets: fabric, supplies, cost, making time and instructions — exportable as PDF.
vide.patron_sous: Archive your patterns with sizes, level and piece count — then sell them from your catalog.
vide.moodboard_sous: Collage your inspirations and note your color palette.

outils_creatifs.vendre_aide: Open a catalog creation, then the Pattern section, to put it on sale.
